title: SingHarbor
setup_desc: Create your administrator account to get started.
available_protocols: Available server-side proxy protocols for deployment.
detected_inbounds: All inbound protocols detected from the current sing-box configuration.
not_recognized: Not fully recognized - raw config preserved
server_inbound_json_help: Preserves every sing-box field. The complete candidate configuration is validated before atomic replacement.
client_endpoint_profile_help: Client-only IPv4, IPv6, domain, Cloudflare and Reality public-key metadata. This is not written into sing-box JSON.
restart_after_save: Restart sing-box after saving when it is running
export_empty: No client variants are available to export.
public_endpoints_desc: Addresses published to clients are separate from the sing-box listen address.
cloudflare_orange_cloud: Route the domain through Cloudflare (orange cloud)
cloudflare_preferred_ip_help: Optional client-only connect address. TLS SNI and WebSocket Host keep using the public domain; this does not change sing-box configuration or DNS.
cloudflare_dns_desc: Preview and explicitly synchronize A/AAAA records. The API token is used once and never saved.
token_not_saved: Use a Zone DNS Edit token. It is not stored by SingHarbor.
confirm_dns_sync: Apply these DNS changes to Cloudflare?
websocket_cdn_desc: Available for VMess, VLESS, and Trojan using sing-box V2Ray transport.
cloudflare_ws_note: Orange-cloud mode creates independent listeners: IPv4/IPv6 use native TCP on the direct port without TLS/WebSocket; the domain uses WebSocket + TLS on the Cloudflare port. Both reuse the same credentials.
cdn_listen_port_help: Used only by the domain WebSocket + TLS listener; normally 443.
no_public_endpoint: Configure a public IPv4, IPv6, or domain endpoint to generate client links.
one_click_deploy_desc: Automatically allocate ports and credentials, atomically deploy every compatible protocol, and return all client links.
domain_block_help: Used for Cloudflare WebSocket routes and as SNI for TLS-only direct protocols.
certificate_block_help: Optional certificate for the Cloudflare CDN route. Cloudflare Origin CA certificates are not used for direct TLS when Let's Encrypt is enabled.
lets_encrypt_enabled: Automatically issue a public Let's Encrypt certificate for TLS Direct
lets_encrypt_email_help: Used for expiry and account notices from Let's Encrypt.
lets_encrypt_cloudflare_token_help: Requires Zone DNS Edit access. The token is used through a temporary mode-0600 file and is never saved by SingHarbor. Leave empty only when CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is set.
lets_encrypt_renewal_help: DNS-01 works behind the orange cloud and does not use port 80. Because the token is not stored, run this action again before expiry; CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN avoids re-entering it but does not schedule renewal.
address_block_help: IPv4 and IPv6 are independent; leave either one empty to skip only that address family.
one_click_skip_note: An empty domain skips domain/TLS routes. An empty certificate directory skips CDN unless Let's Encrypt is enabled. Empty IP fields skip direct links. Invalid non-empty values stop deployment.
one_click_dns_note: A/AAAA records are not changed here. Let's Encrypt DNS-01 temporarily creates and removes an _acme-challenge TXT record; other domain routes must already be proxied or synchronized.
confirm_deploy_all: This will issue/reuse the selected certificate, back up the current config, and atomically deploy or update compatible inbounds. Continue?
